sources.name: Scottish Financial Review
sources.notes: Dedicated Scottish financial and business news site. High signal-to-noise for Scottish VC deals — confirmed 6 relevant deals in the May 2026 run. URL structure: /YYYY/MM/DD/slug.

sources.name: The Scotsman — Business
sources.notes: Scan business section headlines. Business-section RSS confirmed working at /business/rss — returns ~12 items, all business-relevant.

sources.name: The Herald — Business
sources.notes: Strong Glasgow/West of Scotland coverage

sources.name: Insider.co.uk
sources.notes: Scottish business focused, very relevant. RSS feed is dead (stub channel, lastBuildDate 2022) and /search?q= doesn't run a real site search (returns nav only) — removed both, homepage link extraction confirmed working (funding-relevant headlines present directly on /).

sources.name: TechHub Scotland / Scottish Tech Scene blogs
sources.notes: Aggregates Scottish business news

sources.name: DuckDuckGo — Scottish VC search
sources.notes: Run each query as ?q=<encoded query>. JS-free endpoint, returns plain HTML results

sources.name: TechCrunch — Scotland search
sources.notes: Larger deals that make international press. The /search/... URL doesn't run a real server-side search — confirmed 2026-07-13 it returns the same generic homepage-style content as techcrunch.com/?s=scotland and techcrunch.com with no query (near-identical link sets, no scoping). Stage 1a's title-only keyword filter also missed a genuinely Scottish headline that day ("Orbex's new funding may accelerate its Prime microlauncher into orbit" — Orbex is Forres-based — matched a funding term but no money/place term). Routed to Stage 1b via route_to_scraper so the agent can judge full articles directly.

sources.name: Sifted — UK/Scotland
sources.notes: European startup media, covers UK deals well. RSS feed is title-only (no description/content:encoded) and the ?s= search param is silently ignored by the feed endpoint, so Stage 1a's keyword prefilter can never pass anything on title text alone — confirmed 0 ledger hits ever (2026-07-13). search_path was also dead: /search is client-side JS-rendered, returns an empty shell via both httpx and WebFetch. Routed to Stage 1b via route_to_scraper so the agent can judge headlines directly and follow promising links, instead of a rigid keyword substring match against title-only text.

sources.name: Tech Funding News
sources.notes: Covers UK/EU startup funding rounds

sources.name: Techstart Ventures — Portfolio
sources.notes: Pre-seed/seed investor very active in Scotland. Portfolio page links to press coverage of follow-on rounds — fetch the page and follow coverage links to extract deal details.

sources.name: Octopus Ventures — Blog
sources.notes: UK-wide VC with some Scottish portfolio companies. Blog features investment announcement posts explaining why they backed specific companies — scan for Scottish deals.

sources.name: Highlight Capital — News
sources.notes: Check for Scottish deal announcements

sources.name: PXN Ventures — News
sources.notes: Edinburgh-based successor to Par Equity (merged with Praetura Ventures in 2025). Strong Scottish focus.

sources.name: BGF — News
sources.notes: Growth-stage investor with Edinburgh office. RSS feed is dead (empty channel) — removed. /news was also the wrong URL (an evergreen insights/blog page dated back to 2022) — the real, actively-updated deal announcement feed is at /newsroom/, confirmed with entries dated as recently as this week. 2026-07-01 audit: plain httpx + link extraction works cleanly — moved to Stage 1a.

sources.name: Maven Capital Partners — Latest News
sources.notes: Maven's newsroom covers deal announcements across their funds including Investment Fund for Scotland (IFS Maven Equity Finance). Good source for Scottish Seed/Growth deals. 2026-07-01 audit: plain httpx + link extraction works cleanly — moved to Stage 1a.

sources.name: Kelvin Capital — News
sources.notes: Glasgow-based VC with West of Scotland focus. Active deal announcements and portfolio milestones.

sources.name: Epidarex Capital — News
sources.notes: Edinburgh-based life sciences specialist. Covers funding rounds and portfolio milestones for biotech/medtech companies.

sources.name: Mercia Asset Management — News
sources.notes: UK-wide VC with MEIF and other funds active in Scotland. Deal announcements cover Seed through Series B.

sources.name: Parkwalk — News
sources.notes: University spinout specialist active across UK ecosystems including Edinburgh and St Andrews. Covers funding rounds and portfolio milestones. 2026-07-01 audit: plain httpx + link extraction works cleanly — moved to Stage 1a.

sources.name: Edinburgh Innovations — News
sources.notes: University of Edinburgh's commercialisation arm. Covers spinout funding rounds and investment news via Old College Capital. High relevance for Edinburgh deep tech and life sciences deals. 2026-07-01 audit: plain httpx + link extraction works cleanly — moved to Stage 1a.

sources.name: Angel Capital Scotland
sources.notes: News feed for the Angel Capital Association of Scotland — covers deals from Equity Gap, Tricapital, and other Scottish angel syndicates. Confirmed source for Lentitek, JET Connectivity, Jump Ship Brewing in May 2026 comparison test.

sources.name: Archangels — News
sources.notes: Scotland's oldest and largest angel syndicate. Consistently active in Edinburgh life sciences, medtech, and software. High-signal source for early-stage Scottish deals.

sources.name: DIGIT
sources.notes: Scottish tech news site with a dedicated funding category and monthly deal roundup articles (e.g. 'DIGIT Deal Roundup | March 2026'). High signal-to-noise for Scottish tech VC deals. URL pattern: /digit-deal-roundup-MONTH-YEAR/ for roundups.

sources.name: BusinessCloud — Scotland
sources.notes: UK tech/business news site with good Scottish coverage. Supplementary search source for Scottish VC deals.

sources.name: Daily Business Group
sources.notes: Scottish business news site covering deals and investments. Homepage returns 403 to direct fetches (bot protection) — use the RSS feed instead, confirmed working and fresh.

sources.name: Campfire Scotland Newsletter
sources.notes: Weekly Scottish startup newsletter covering deals, funding rounds, and ecosystem news. Substack feed confirmed working — typically includes full post content, reducing paywall risk.

sources.name: Scottish Financial News
sources.notes: Scottish business and finance news site, distinct from scottishfinancialreview.com. Has a dedicated articles section. Confirmed reachable (200 OK) as of 2026-06-23 — an earlier 403 noted by the scraper appears to have been transient.

sources.name: Scottish EDGE — News
sources.notes: Scotland's biggest funding competition. News page features winner announcements and follow-on funding details for past round winners. Regular archive of competition rounds (2020–2026) with card-based layout. No RSS feed — newsletter signup available. 2026-07-01 audit: plain httpx + link extraction works cleanly — moved to Stage 1a.

sources.name: SOSV — News
sources.notes: Deep tech venture capital firm with active Scottish portfolio companies. News page features investment announcements, company milestones, and founder stories. Focus on hard tech, climate, and health tech. Chronological feed format. 2026-07-01 audit: plain httpx + link extraction returns genuine article/event headlines cleanly (no Scottish matches that day, but extraction itself works) — moved to Stage 1a.

sources.name: University of Strathclyde — News
sources.notes: Glasgow-based university with active spinout investment program. News section covers spinout funding announcements, company valuations, and commercialization milestones. High relevance for Glasgow tech and manufacturing spinouts. 2026-07-01 audit: plain httpx + link extraction works cleanly — moved to Stage 1a.

sources.name: 4BIO Capital — News
sources.notes: Biotech-focused venture capital firm. Newsroom covers life sciences and biotech investment announcements and portfolio company milestones. 2026-07-01 audit: plain httpx + link extraction works cleanly — moved to Stage 1a.

sources.name: Foresight Group — News & Insights
sources.notes: Large fund manager (9 Scottish transactions). News & Insights section features exit announcements, case studies, and investment themes. Recent example: Fieldway exit to Axis CLC (June 2026).

sources.name: Playfair Capital — Content
sources.notes: Pre-seed focused venture capital with content and portfolio sections. Covers early-stage funding announcements and founder resources.

sources.name: SFC Capital — Blog
sources.notes: SFC Capital manages portfolio of 400+ early-stage businesses across B2B software, fintech, medtech, and green tech. Blog covers investment news and sector insights. 12 Scottish transactions. 2026-07-01 audit: plain httpx + link extraction works cleanly — moved to Stage 1a.

sources.name: Future Planet Capital — Blog
sources.notes: Impact-focused venture capital specializing in university spinouts and growth companies tackling global challenges. Blog covers portfolio company updates and investment announcements. 7 Scottish transactions. 2026-07-01 audit confirmed plain httpx + link extraction returns genuine article headlines cleanly, so it was moved to Stage 1a via direct_fetch_confirmed — but it has produced zero ledger hits since. 2026-07-13: found the real cause — Stage 1a's title-only keyword filter requires a place-name/money term in the headline itself (e.g. "Future Planet Capital Makes Strategic Investment in Nutri-San" matches a funding term but not a place/amount term), which most genuine portfolio-update headlines don't include. Reverted direct_fetch_confirmed and routed to Stage 1b instead so the agent can judge full articles directly.

sources.name: Green Angel Ventures — Stories
sources.notes: Climate tech focused angel syndicate. Stories section highlights portfolio companies and climate tech innovations. 4 Scottish transactions.

sources.name: Ada Ventures — Updates & Insights
sources.notes: Impact-led venture capital with focus on inclusive investing. Updates & Insights section features investment rationales (e.g., 'Why we invested' posts), industry research, and impact reports.

sources.name: 500 Global — Content Hub & Rise Report
sources.notes: Global accelerator with 35+ billion-dollar portfolio companies. Content Hub and Rise Report provide investment insights and portfolio updates. 2 Scottish transactions. Global scope but may cover relevant UK ecosystem stories.

sources.name: Techstars — Newsroom & Blog
sources.notes: Global accelerator network with 23 billion-dollar portfolio companies ($133.4B cumulative market cap). Newsroom and blog cover portfolio company announcements and funding rounds. Global scope but captures larger UK/Scottish deals that achieve significant follow-on funding.

sources.name: STAC — News
sources.notes: Scottish deep tech accelerator and investor (6 transactions). News section features investment announcements across quantum computing, clean energy, healthtech, and housing tech. Card-based layout with category tags (Invest, News, Events). Active portfolio company announcements and milestone updates.

sources.name: FutureScot
sources.notes: Scottish technology and business news site. Covered Wordsmith AI Series B (June 2026) with detailed reporting on the round, investors, and growth plans. Regularly covers Scottish startup funding events. Removed `queries` — that mechanism is DuckDuckGo-specific (result-parsing hardcoded to DDG's HTML) and `?q=` isn't this site's real search syntax, so it was silently doing nothing; homepage link extraction confirmed working directly.

sources.name: The Edinburgh Reporter
sources.notes: Edinburgh local news site that covers Edinburgh startup funding, sometimes ahead of larger outlets. Produced the primary article on Infrawatch's pre-seed round (May 2026) before it appeared elsewhere. Worth monitoring for early Edinburgh-specific deal coverage. Removed `queries` — DuckDuckGo-specific search mechanism was silently doing nothing against this site's own domain; homepage link extraction confirmed working directly.

sources.name: Bdaily — Scotland
sources.notes: UK business news site with a dedicated Scotland region feed. Confirmed relevant deal: VASO Global (Dumfries) raised £5m+ from PXN Ventures, Scottish Enterprise, UKRI, and Eco Group (June 2026), reported at /articles/YYYY/MM/DD/slug. No RSS at /feed (404) but /region/scotland/rss works and returns individual items — the index page itself yields almost no extractable text via trafilatura, so RSS is required for this source, not optional.

sources.name: Crunchbase
sources.notes: Scottish funding rounds filtered by HQ city (Edinburgh, Glasgow, Aberdeen, Dundee, Stirling, Perth, Inverness, Livingston, Paisley, Dunfermline). Handled in Stage 1c by pipeline/firecrawl_scraper.py, not by Stage 1a or 1b. Free tier shows top 5 most recent results sorted by announced date. URL is a saved search with all 10 city filters applied. Requires CRUNCHBASE_AUTH_COOKIE in .env — see CLAUDE.md Stage 1c for refresh instructions.
